Shock/Curiosity emails
What you can use these for
- Used as affiliate swipes
- Used for cold traffic lists (i.e. Newsmax or something similar)
SHOW EXAMPLE
Why they work
- BIG open rate
- BIG click through rate
- Can send 5-8x the number of clicks as a normal email
- Conversions will be lower, but overall revenue can be much higher if
you get it right
What offers they work with
- Offers where the VSL does ALL of the selling (i.e. if someone clicks
on a banner and lands on your VSL and it sells, then this style will
work)
What offers they DON’T work with
- Offers that need a little pre-selling
- Text sales pages (usually)
What matters most on shock/curiosity emails
- Subject line
- Uniqueness of the shock/curioisty angle
- Picture
